description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this turquoise blue backpack from adidas. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of.MeasurementHeight: 21"Width: 15.5"Depth: 5.5"Made of polyester and polyurethane for enhanced durabilityOne roomy compartment with an inner compartment for essentialsToggle strap for adjusting the size of the mouthTwo zippered pockets on the front for additional spaceAdidas patented 3-Stripes printed on the pocketsHaul loop for handling easeFlap over the mouth of the bag with a loop for enhanced durability and styleBrand name embroidered on the flapPadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useNylon bonded thread for long lifeCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
